gameTitle: ~Hack~ Pokémon Sword and Shield Ultimate Plus

achievements.description: Defeat Allister or Bea without paralysing or putting any opponents to sleep. [Set Mode / Cap Lv36]

achievements.description: Defeat Bede in Stow-on-Side.

achievements.description: Defeat Opal without making your Pokemon Dynamax. [Set Mode / Cap Lv38]

achievements.description: Defeat Hop on Route 7.

achievements.description: Defeat Gordie or Melony in Circhester for either the Rock or the Ice Badge.

achievements.description: Defeat Gordie or Melony without having more than 3 Pokemon in your party. [Set Mode / Cap Lv42]

achievements.description: Defeat Piers without using any items or having your Pokemon hold any items. [Set Mode / Cap Lv46]

achievements.description: Defeat Raihan without letting any of your Pokemon faint. [Set Mode / Cap Lv48]

achievements.description: Defeat Marnie and Hop at the Pokemon League.
